channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: St. Francis, with a little help from Mother Nature, tops Mitty for 3rd straight CCS top-division title
item.description: A fortuitous push helped the Lancers hold off Mitty in the CCS Division I championship game, earning St.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Mitty girls survive Pinewood comeback in dramatic CCS Open championship victory
item.description: 2025 CCS Open Division girls basketball championship game: Archbishop Mitty girls win their 33rd Central Coast Section basketball title under Sue Phillips
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: The world's most famous sled dog race is longer than ever. Here's a look at Iditarod, by the numbers
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The world’s most famous sled dog race is longer this year than ever before. Thanks to a lack of snow, this year's edition of the Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race needed a new route across the Alaska wilderness.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Baseball explodes at the plate for dominant double-header sweep
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — On an absolutely picturesque day for baseball at The Diamond at the Bus Bergman Sports Complex, CMU trailed MSU Billings 2-0 early. A 2-run shot to right by MSU's River Smith in the top of the 2nd put the Mavs in a hole.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Cavaliers' comeback win over Celtics give them confidence they can compete with defending champs
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — With Celtics fans in a frenzy throughout TD Garden after the Boston Celtics blitzed to a 25-3 lead over the Cavaliers in the final matchup of Eastern Conference frontrunners, Cleveland star Donovan Mitchell didn't panic. He actually was in a calm place.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mitchell scores 41, Cavaliers overcome 22-point deficit to beat the Celtics 123-116
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 41 points, including 12 in the fourth quarter, to help the Cleveland Cavaliers rally from 22 points down and stun the Boston Celtics 123-116 on Friday night in the final regular-season meeting of the Eastern Conference’s top two teams.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Accused accomplice in former Olympian's alleged $1 billion cocaine ring faces federal charges in US
item.description: An accused accomplice in a $1 billion drug ring allegedly led by former Canadian Olympic snowboarder Ryan Wedding has been sent to the U.S. to face federal charges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bountiful 3-peats with another 5A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful girls basketball team has built a true dynasty. The Redhawks knocked off previously undefeated West High to win its third straight state championship Friday night at the Huntsman Center, 57-47.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC visit No. 2 UCLA in winner-take-all game for Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: The Big Ten probably didn't expect to have two West Coast schools dominate the women's basketball standings when the league opened its doors to UCLA and USC this season.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: QB Matthew Stafford gets a restructured contract and agrees to stay with the Los Angeles Rams
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Quarterback Matthew Stafford is staying with the Los Angeles Rams under a restructured contract, ending weeks of speculation about the Super Bowl winner's future. The Rams announced their new agreement with Stafford on Friday without initially revealing any details.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Joel Embiid will miss the rest of the season for treatment and rehabilitation of his left knee
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — Joel Embiid could have been one of the all-time greats of his era. The 7-footer who anchored the 76ers' laborious rebuilding plan known as the Process sure flashed his dominance at times through his injury-riddled career. He dropped 70 points. Won an MVP and two scoring titles.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn's Hugh Freeze expected to make a full recovery after being diagnosed with prostate cancer
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Auburn coach Hugh Freeze has been diagnosed with an early form of prostate cancer, the school announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump claims Eagles will visit White House for Super Bowl celebration after skipping 2018 visit
item.description: President Donald Trump said the Super Bowl champion Philadelphia Eagles plan to visit the White House to celebrate their championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia passes 'Riley Gaines Act' that aims to prohibit trans athletes from competing in female sports
item.description: The Georgia House passed the "Riley Gaines Act" on Thursday, which aims to keep transgender athletes from competing against biological girls and women.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off
item.description: It's time for everyone to start their engines as the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off on Friday, February 28.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards suspended 1 game by NBA after picking up 16th technical foul
item.description: Minnesota Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards has been suspended one game without pay by the NBA after picking up his 16th technical foul of the season during the third quarter against the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: In dominant triple-double performance, Pelicans' Zion Williamson provides reminder of his talent
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The injuries have taken on toll on Zion Williamson during his six-year NBA career. So have the losses. But on nights like Thursday, there are tantalizing reminders of how much talent the 2019 No. 1 overall pick still possesses.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine House speaker deletes X account after censuring lawmaker opposed to transgender athletes in girls sports
item.description: The Maine House of Representatives' Democratic speaker, Ryan Fecteau, deleted his X account days after censuring Republican Rep. Laurel Libby.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: No. 5 UConn claims 5th straight Big East regular-season title with 72-53 win over No. 22 Creighton
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Sarah Strong had 22 points and nine rebounds and Paige Bueckers added 15 points, seven rebounds and seven assists as No. 5 UConn defeated No. 22 Creighton 72-53 on Thursday night and claimed its fifth straight Big East regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giddey scores 25 points as the Bulls snap a 6-game skid with a 142-110 rout of the 76ers
item.description: Josh Giddey had 25 points, 16 rebounds and six assists as the Chicago Bulls ended a six-game skid by routing the Philadelphia 76ers 142-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's comeback effort falls short at UCF, 76-72
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Darius Johnson scored a reverse layup with 2.5 seconds left to give UCF the lead and Keyshawn Hall added two free throws after a turnover as the Knights knocked off Utah, 76-72 Sunday to snap a seven-game losing streak and earn their first win in a month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bell takes only lead in OT to edge Hocevar, Larson in another thrilling NASCAR finish in Atlanta
item.description: Christopher Bell celebrated a drought-ending victory for himself and Joe Gibbs Racing after a dramatic comeback in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Sky acquire 2-time All-Star Atkins from Washington Mystics for 2025 No. 3 pick
item.description: The Chicago Sky have traded their top pick in the upcoming WNBA draft for two-time All-Star guard Ariel Atkins from the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Booker, Durant and Beal help the Suns beat the Bulls to snap a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Devin Booker had 29 points and eight assists, Kevin Durant scored 27 points and Bradley Beal had 25 in his return to the starting lineup to help the Phoenix Suns beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Mission Bay 44, Torrey Pines 42
item.description: A big time matchup in boys open division quarters with a #4 and #5 seed matchup, Torrey Pines and Mission Bay.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5
